narrative:
Westerville 4-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,179 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a modest Republican lean of 3.1 percentage points.
